# inspect

```go
import "github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/internal/commands/inspect"
```

Package inspect contains branch/commit issue\-ID extraction helpers.

<a name="ExtractIssueIDsFromCommits"></a>
## func [ExtractIssueIDsFromCommits](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/commands/inspect/issue_ids.go#L17>)

```go
func ExtractIssueIDsFromCommits(commits []git.Commit) []string
```

ExtractIssueIDsFromCommits extracts unique issue IDs from commit messages.

<a name="BranchInfo"></a>
## type [BranchInfo](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/commands/inspect/workflow.go#L17-L21>)

BranchInfo represents branch\-related inspect command output.

```go
type BranchInfo struct {
    Name          string
    IssueID       string
    DefaultBranch string
}
```

<a name="CommitInfo"></a>
## type [CommitInfo](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/commands/inspect/workflow.go#L10-L14>)

CommitInfo represents one commit in inspect command output.

```go
type CommitInfo struct {
    Hash    string
    Message string
    Author  string
}
```

<a name="IssueInfo"></a>
## type [IssueInfo](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/commands/inspect/workflow.go#L24-L33>)

IssueInfo represents issue\-related inspect command output.

```go
type IssueInfo struct {
    Key         string
    Summary     string
    Description string
    Status      string
    Type        string
    ParentKey   string
    EpicKey     string
    URL         string
}
```

<a name="WorkflowDeps"></a>
## type [WorkflowDeps](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/commands/inspect/workflow.go#L50-L54>)

WorkflowDeps are inspect workflow dependencies.

```go
type WorkflowDeps struct {
    NewGitClient     func(*viper.Viper, *chan string) (git.Git, error)
    NewJiraClient    func(*viper.Viper) (jira.Jira, error)
    FetchBranchIssue func(jira.Jira, string) (*jira.Issue, error)
}
```

<a name="WorkflowOptions"></a>
## type [WorkflowOptions](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/commands/inspect/workflow.go#L44-L47>)

WorkflowOptions controls inspect workflow selection behavior.

```go
type WorkflowOptions struct {
    Branch string
    Issue  string
}
```

<a name="WorkflowResult"></a>
## type [WorkflowResult](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/commands/inspect/workflow.go#L36-L41>)

WorkflowResult is the internal inspect workflow result.

```go
type WorkflowResult struct {
    Branch   *BranchInfo
    Issue    *IssueInfo
    IssueIDs []string
    Commits  []CommitInfo
}
```

<a name="WorkflowRunner"></a>
## type [WorkflowRunner](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotin-go/blob/main/internal/commands/inspect/workflow.go#L57-L61>)

WorkflowRunner executes the inspect workflow.

```go
type WorkflowRunner struct {
    Config  *viper.Viper
    Options WorkflowOptions
    Deps    WorkflowDeps
}
```
